heading: Connect an Application to MongoDB with Workload Identity Federation
body:
Use the listed version or higher of the following MongoDB Drivers to connect an
application to MongoDB with Workload Identity Federation authentication:

- [Java](java/sync/upcoming/security/auth/oidc) v5.1+

- [C#/.NET](csharp/security/authentication/oidc) v2.25+

- [Go](go/fundamentals/enterprise-auth) v1.17+

- [PyMongo](languages/python/pymongo-driver/security/authentication) v4.7+

- [Node](node/security/authentication/oidc) / [Typescript](typescript) v6.7+

- [Kotlin](kotlin/coroutine/current/fundamentals/enterprise-auth) v5.1+

- [Rust Driver](rust/fundamentals/enterprise-auth) v3.2+
